post.summary: Rank SMB workflow automation opportunities.
post.description: Ranks candidate workflows using frequency, time savings, revenue impact, customer experience impact, data readiness, tool readiness, process clarity, ownership, risk level, and human-review readiness. Returns safety-adjusted priority ranking and recommendations.

ScoreValue.description: 0 = Not ready, 1 = Needs cleanup, 2 = Mostly ready, 3 = Ready for pilot. For riskLevel, higher means lower risk.

OpportunityWeights.description: Optional overrides for ranking weights. Omitted weights use SMB-focused defaults.

workflowName.description: Short name of the workflow opportunity.

workflowDescription.description: Brief description of the current workflow.

owner.description: Person or team that owns the workflow.

riskLevel.description: Higher score means lower risk and stronger suitability for a controlled pilot.

touchesCustomers.description: Whether the workflow touches customers or customer communications.

touchesMoney.description: Whether the workflow touches billing, pricing, payments, collections, or financial workflows.

touchesSensitiveData.description: Whether the workflow touches private, confidential, or sensitive data.

touchesLegalCompliance.description: Whether the workflow touches legal, contractual, regulatory, or compliance matters.

touchesTaxAccounting.description: Whether the workflow touches tax, accounting, bookkeeping, or financial reporting.

touchesHrEmployment.description: Whether the workflow touches HR, hiring, payroll, performance, or employment decisions.

touchesMedicalHealth.description: Whether the workflow touches medical, health, or wellness-related information or decisions.

customerFacingFinalAction.description: Whether the automation could send or perform a final customer-facing action.

WorkflowOpportunityInput.description: One workflow candidate to rank. Omitted factor scores default to 1, but better inputs produce better rankings.

enum: Limited automation pilot with human approval
Keep human-led; use AI only for drafts or summaries

workflowName.description: Name of the workflow being scored.

workflowDescription.description: Brief description of the current workflow.

userGoal.description: What the user wants to improve or automate.

notes.description: Optional general notes about the workflow or scoring assumptions.
